name: Drew Laborde Golf Academy
about: The Drew Laborde Golf Academy is an indoor golf training facility and simulator venue operating in Metairie, Louisiana. The academy offers private and small group instruction for golfers of all ages and skill levels, utilizing TrackMan 4 technology for data-driven swing analysis. Adjacent to the academy is a separate indoor golf facility featuring two bays equipped with simulators for play and practice on over 130 world-renowned courses. Both locations provide a climate-controlled environment suitable for year-round golf activities, with the academy focused on instruction and the facility on game simulation and practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced TrackMan 4 technology provides precise swing analysis with 13 data points
Access to over 130 virtual golf courses for immersive practice and play
Separate putting area dedicated to short game improvement
Private and group lessons available for all skill levels and ages
Climate-controlled indoor facility for year-round play regardless of weather

food_and_drink.notes: No food services mentioned on website
No alcohol services mentioned on website

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for instruction at the academy; Virtual Golf 3 simulators at the indoor facility

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are welcome to bring your own clubs. The venue also offers club rentals and fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink services are mentioned on the website, so it's recommended to confirm BYOB policies directly with the venue.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, typical simulator bay time for 18 holes ranges from 1-2 hours depending on course and simulator speed.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Drew Laborde Golf Academy offers junior lessons and is designed to help golfers of all ages, including youth.
